scripts.dev: NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-dev npm run clean && NODE_OPTIONS='--require ./scripts/node-localstorage-shim.cjs' NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-dev next dev
scripts.build: NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-build npm run clean && NODE_OPTIONS='--require ./scripts/node-localstorage-shim.cjs' NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-build next build
